blockers.observed: carboncaste.io uses Namecheap nameservers dns1.registrar-servers.com and dns2.registrar-servers.com; carboncaste.io has A record 38.45.14.38; venn.carboncaste.io and gun-a/gun-b/gun-c.venn.carboncaste.io have no A records.
blockers.required_human_action: Provide registrar/DNS API access or create A/AAAA records for venn.carboncaste.io, gun-a.venn.carboncaste.io, gun-b.venn.carboncaste.io, and gun-c.venn.carboncaste.io pointing at the intended public ingress.

blockers.observed: The Mac mini and ssh humble both report public IPv4 129.222.193.128; inbound TCP 80 and 443 to 129.222.193.128 timed out.
blockers.required_human_action: Provide router/firewall/NAT control or an alternate public ingress so inbound 80/443 and WSS traffic can reach the selected bootstrap hosts.

blockers.observed: sudo -n true exits 1 on both the Mac mini and humble; noninteractive service/firewall/privileged-port administration is not available to this agent.
blockers.required_human_action: Provide noninteractive sudo/admin rights or preinstall the service, firewall, and privileged-port configuration required for 443/TLS/WSS.

blockers.observed: No caddy/certbot/nginx binary is installed on either host, and DNS plus inbound 80/443 are not available for ACME DNS-01 or HTTP-01 validation.
blockers.required_human_action: Provide TLS tooling plus DNS challenge credentials, or open inbound 80/443 and authorize installation/configuration of an ACME-capable reverse proxy.

blockers.observed: The required public WSS peers wss://gun-a.venn.carboncaste.io/gun, wss://gun-b.venn.carboncaste.io/gun, and wss://gun-c.venn.carboncaste.io/gun cannot be truthfully deployed or probed until DNS, inbound reachability, TLS, and service permissions are available.
blockers.required_human_action: After the above access is provided, deploy the three public WSS peers without lowering Mesh thresholds and run the public WSS proof.
